blockingIssues.description: The required deletion of src/pages/projects.astro is still not captured in the fix commit history; commit 80bc73a modifies only src/pages/index.astro and src/pages/about.astro, while the projects.astro deletion remains unstaged in the working tree.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit pre-handoff verification step for required file deletions: workers should confirm both `git status --porcelain` and `git show --name-status <commit>` prove the deletion is included in the feature commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In fix-scrutiny-site-content-blocking, the required src/pages/projects.astro deletion was not part of commit 80bc73a and remained only as an unstaged delete, causing the rerun review to fail.

rejectedObservations.observation: content-worker procedure compliance evidence mismatch for manual verification
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of prior-round systemic recommendation already recorded in site-content scrutiny round 1
